title: taraxacum subbracteatum
intro: Taraxacum subbracteatum, also known as the lesser dandelion or lesser hawk's beard, is a plant species in the dandelion family, Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Taraxacum subbracteatum include its potential to support liver health, lower blood pressure, and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
